data.name: Demon Love: Wish island
data.detailed_description:
LET’S ESCAPE INTO THE WORLD OF YOUR SECRET DESIRES!

Into a realm of passion where every choice you make matters. Decide for yourself who to have fun with and how far you’re willing to go. I can see what you want, sweetheart. It’s written all over your face, hehe! Relax. I love watching the moment when that saintly mask of yours starts to slip.

And luckily for you… you have me. Oh right… I forgot to introduce myself. I’m Lulu. The demoness who made you a very tempting deal.

Don’t sulk, I’m on your side. I’ll always help when things start getting heated. But only then. That makes it more fun, hehe! Don’t be afraid, follow me. I’ll guide you.

GAME FEATURES

  • I’ll introduce you to the island’s hottest heroines — each with her own personality, desires, and unique scenes.

  • I’ll be your assistant — my advice and abilities will come in handy in the most interesting situations.

  • I’ll let you influence the course of events — choose dialogue options, change how scenes unfold, and see where it leads.

  • Mini-games and progression — complete mini-games, earn resources, and use them at the right moment.

  • I’ll guide you through the island’s locations — explore new places and meet new people.

THE GIRLS OF THE ISLAND

I already know who you’ll want to start with…

  • Different personalities — gentle, bold, playful, and those who prefer to keep their distance.

  • Each has her own way of communicating — your approach influences how the relationship develops.

  • Different intimate scenes — each girl has her own style, fantasies, and spicy moments.

  • Lulu is always nearby — I’ll help you understand each heroine a little better.

Still hesitating? Come on… you’ve already gone further than you planned. I can see it. You want to come with me.

I’ll be waiting for you in the game. Come join me!

data.short_description: Let’s escape together… I’ll guide you into a world of temptation and seduction. Let’s see how far you’re willing to go. Explore the island’s locations, influence how events unfold, play mini-games, and meet the hottest girls.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 德文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 捷克文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2400 / AMD FX-6300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon R7 260X / Intel HD Graphics 630
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 570
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2400 / AMD FX-6300
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon R7 260X / Intel HD Graphics 630
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 570
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
